description: HTTP CONNECT authority fixtures for opaque multi-colon Proxmox pvespiceproxy hosts
algorithm: connectAuthority(host, port) = host + ":" + strconv.Itoa(port); never net.SplitHostPort / JoinHostPort on host
notes: Proxmox passes the spice proxy ticket as the virt-viewer 'host' field.
PVE::Ticket::verify_spice_connect_url documents that the viewer connects with "$ticket:$port".
New-style host: pvespiceproxy:<8hex_ts>:<vmid>:<node>:<port>::<40hex_sig> (port also appears after final colon in CONNECT)
HTTP version in the line is implementation-defined (HTTP/1.1 preferred; spice-gtk historically used 1.0).

fixtures.name: pve_new_style_token_with_embedded_port
fixtures.comment: Matches PVE::Ticket::verify_spice_connect_url first regex (signed port == CONNECT port)

fixtures.name: pve_old_style_forum_capture
fixtures.comment: Shape observed in public Proxmox forum packet captures (sanitized node name)

fixtures.name: direct_dns_no_proxy_lab
fixtures.comment: Lab cleartext / direct TLS without CONNECT; still avoid SplitHostPort on opaque hosts
